docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT GOLDBERG, LESLIE
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2009 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO MAR-15-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUE FOR 3 MONTHS FOR PROGRESS REPORT UNTIL FULLY PAID.

ORDER DATED JAN-07-2009, "DENIED" ON REQUES TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE CASE REMAINS SET ON ORIGINAL HEARING DATE JAN-28-2009 AT 8:30 AM. ALL PARTIES MUST BE PRESENT ON THAT DATE. THE REQUEST IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO A NEW REQUEST WITH SUPPORTING DOCUMENTS OR INFORMATION CONCERNING WHY AN EXTENDED CONTINUANCE IS REQUIRED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2009 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED DEC-11-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDBERG, LESLIE

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-15-2010 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO JUL-19-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT GAVE PLAINTIFF 4 POSTDATED CHECKS, 3 FOR $200 AND 1 FOR $250. IF ALL CHECKS CLEARS, PLAINTIFF TO FILE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,110.14 FILED BY KATZ, BERT AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDBERG, LESLIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND, LOURDES DE LEON ,KATHERINE FISHER, QUALIFIED CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS AND TROY HANSEN; 5880 OWENS DRIVE, PLEASANTON, CA 94588
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KATZ, BERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDBERG, LESLIE $1,950.14 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,030.14 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,100.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $113.92 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDBERG, LESLIE
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-19-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDBERG, LESLIE HEARING SET FOR SEP-28-2009 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-28-2009 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO DEC-14-2009 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. DEFENDANT TO PAY $100 PER MONTH STARTING OCT. 5, 2009. IF NO APPEARANCE ON 12/14/09, CONTINUE FOR ANOTHER 3 MONTHS.
